column1: Hey Cat, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Hi! Our break is from March 7 - March 15
cool i got you, which destination were you lookin to book?
Like the cheapest and the safest and like a lit place
i got you, i def recommend punta cana or cancun, i'll personally be in punta cana i love it there
how many ppl in your group so far?
Personally I think we don't want to do punta Cana but we have 7 in our group. Do you have any other recs!
yea no worries! we have cancun, cabo, bahamas. i'll send you over a bunch of options to check out
and word thats a solid squad! we all from the same school?
dope what school? I'll hook it up with a good group rate
Loved “yea no worries! we have cancun, cabo, bahamas. i'll send you over a bunch of options to check out”
nicee yea i'll def hook it up for you!
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?
perfect I got you, cool if I send it through email? its a little long for text
cool whats the best email for you?
just sent that over lmk if it came through! slid the cyber monday deal in there too for you
Perfect thank you! I'll lyk when we all talk it through
If we wait 2 weeks how much do you think the prices will go up because we're still going through finals
Honestly not sure. Things have been flying so prices can go up at any time or even sell out
heyy Cat checkin in, how we feelin about spring break?
hey Cat whats up, how are things lookin on your end with spring break?
sup! You still lookin for help with planning spring break?
whats up Cat did y'all still need help with spring break or you all set?
Hi what happens if I switch my start and end date from the original itinerary
hey thats fine. we can accommodate whichever dates work best for you
So would the prices stay the same?
heyy Cat checkin in, did we wanna make a move on one of those options?
Hey just wanted to know more about what's exactly in the party package
Yea for sure party package comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar at our off resort nightclub events!
In Punta Cana our spots are Imagine cave, Maroca, and coco bongo
So for Cancun what would that look like
And for either of the resorts are there clubs on site
Yea Cancuns got a bunch of spots, D'Cave, Rakata, Mandala, mandala beach club, coco bongo
Same kinda deal, open bar etc
And there is a club on each resort but they're not like top top nightlife lol. Gets the job done tho
Hey we're ready to move forward with Cancun Krystal but we want to change the itinerary to March 8-March 12 and add on the party package!
Okay cool yea we can do that! I'll set it up for you all in a few and email it all over! Is it still 7 in the group?
Hey morning sending this now! did we want to even out the price for everyone? the 3 person room is a little more than the 4 person rate
just emailed over your reservation! lmk if you need any help navigating through

Hey! I just opened the reservation and I'm seeing that it's about $300 more than the quote. I know it's been a month since I asked for the quote and prices go up, but I was wondering if there's any way for the prices to be lower because I don't know how feasible it is for a lot of our group!
the price difference you're seeing may just be the party pass add on you mentioned. did you want to take the party pass off?
things are the same as the original quote from a month ago, I kept it the same for ya
base price for Krystal package is $646 for the 4 person room, and $726 for the 3 person room
Wait I'm dumb IM SO SORRY. I didn't realize the party package was already included!
This looks good I'll send it to my group :)
lol! all good. yea with the party pass is + $200. which is why we see the $846 and $926
thats for the 3 event party pass
Perfect! And is it ok if most of the group pays by Tuesday?
yea no prob! as long as we can get a couple paid today, that way I can keep it all open and active
Just wondering if the party package is a fixed rate and if we were to potentially take it off right now, would we be able to add it back into the future!
Yea you have until up to 2 days before your trip to add the party pass on. Want me to remove it?
hey checkin in, Connie is behind on payments, do you know if they still plan on going?
Hey she should be, I just texted her to see what's up!
hey hey, If you could ask Connie to toss in her flight info so we can finalize your airport transfers
